'''Corstris''' was a heavily-[[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
[[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] suspected Corstris to be the location of a hidden [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

Its terrain did not improve [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] opinion of forested worlds during the time he served there.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] places Corstris in the "Quelli sector," a misspelling of the true Quelii sector.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
